name: Excessive Firewall Denies from Local Host
notes: Reports excessive attempts from a local host, across multiple hosts, to access the firewall and access is denied. More than 40 attempts are detected across at least 40 destination IP addresses in 5 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 40 times
conditions_text: when the domain is one of the following Array
when the event context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers, BB:HostReference: Proxy Servers
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 40 times, across more than 40 destination IP within 5 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 40 times, across more than 40 destination IP within 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Excessive Firewall Denies from Local Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the domain is one of the following Array
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers, BB:HostReference: Proxy Servers
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 40 times, across more than 40 destination IP within 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Excessive Firewall Denies Across Multiple Hosts From A Local Host

Event description: Detected excessive attempts from a local host, across multiple hosts, to access the firewall and access is denied. More than 40 attempts are detected across at least 40 destination IP addresses in 5 minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
